Our philosophy

Data that tells a story.
Creative that makes you want to listen.

We build compounding systems, not one-off campaigns. Every channel, every creative, every automation is designed to work harder over time — not burn out by month 3.

We believe in

The principles
behind every decision.

🧬
Marketing as a science and an art.
Creativity without data is noise. Every creative decision traces back to what the numbers are saying.
🤖
Using marketing tools, not being one.
We approach every brand fresh — no playbook templates, no recycled strategies.
🎯
Always finding a way to hit KPIs.
Analysts, copywriters, designers, and engineers — all in one room, all aligned on your number.
🤝
Client satisfaction over everything.
You'll feel like we're another department. Responsive, loyal, persistent.
The opportunity

Why Verve, why now.

The market is moving.

The premium DTC activewear market is growing at 19% CAGR through 2028. Verve has the product quality and brand equity to capture a $40M+ slice — but the current marketing stack isn't built to scale at that pace.

19%
Market CAGR 2024–28
$40M
Addressable opportunity
3×
Revenue target 18 months
📉

Paid channels underperforming

Meta ROAS at 2.1× vs. category benchmark of 3.8×. No creative testing framework in place.

🛒

38% cart abandonment

No recovery flow beyond a single generic email sent 24h later. $620k/year left on the table.

💌

Email list of 94k, barely used

Monthly newsletter only. No segmentation, no behavioral triggers, no lifecycle revenue attribution.

Services

What Verve gets
from day one.

✈️ Paid Social 🚀 Paid Search 📩 Email Marketing 🎬 UGC & Creative 🛍️ Affiliate
✈️

Paid Social

Meta + TikTok full-funnel. ASC campaigns, creative testing matrix, LTV-based audience segmentation. Weekly refresh cycle.

🚀

Paid Search

Google Shopping + Performance Max rebuild. PMAX asset group optimization, negative keyword hygiene, ROAS target laddering.

📩

Email & SMS (Klaviyo)

Cart recovery, post-purchase, win-back, VIP flows. SMS integration. Full list segmentation and revenue attribution dashboard.

🎬

UGC & Creative Studio

12 UGC assets/month from vetted creator network. Motion graphics, static ads, Reels — all A/B test-ready from day one.

🛍️

Affiliate Program

Impact.com setup, publisher recruitment (30+ partners), commission structure design, fraud prevention, monthly reporting.

📊

Analytics & Attribution

Triple Whale + GA4 integration. Custom blended ROAS dashboard. Weekly performance reviews with actionable recommendations.

Process

How we get from
zero to compounding.

  1. 01. 🔬 Audit & Teardown— Days 1–14 · Full account audit, pixel validation, Klaviyo health check, competitor creative analysis
  2. 02. 🧠 Strategy & ICP— Days 15–30 · Buyer persona mapping, channel architecture, 90-day creative roadmap
  3. 03. 🚀 Launch Sprint— Month 2 · All campaigns live, cart recovery deployed, first UGC batch shipped
  4. 04. 📈 Optimize & Scale— Months 3–6 · Winners scaled, creative rotation in full swing, affiliate program live
  5. 05. 🏆 Compound Growth— Months 7–18 · Full-funnel flywheel, referral layer, LTV programs, seasonal campaigns
